pages.text: It was a hot summer afternoon.

blocks.text: It was a hot summer afternoon.

pages.text: “If only it could rain,” her brother, Mayamiko, said. It was too hot to let the children play outside.

blocks.text: “If only it could rain,” her brother, Mayamiko, said.
It was too hot to let the children play outside.

pages.text: Ndo-ndo! Lilato heard it first. It sounded like a stone bouncing on the roof of the house. Lilato looked at Mayamiko but he didn’t look at her.

blocks.text: Lilato heard it first. It sounded like a stone bouncing on the roof of the house. Lilato looked at Mayamiko but he didn’t look at her.

pages.text: She tiptoed to the window and looked up at the sky. The sky was grey, almost black in colour.

blocks.text: She tiptoed to the window and looked up at the sky.
The sky was grey, almost black in colour.

pages.text: Lilato started to sing the song her best friend, Mwansa, had taught her. Wemfula isa isa Orain come Twangale na mainsa So we can play in the rain Wemfula isa isa Orain come Twangale na mainsa So we can play in the rain

blocks.text: Lilato started to sing the song her best friend, Mwansa, had taught her.
Wemfula isa isa Orain come Twangale na mainsa So we can play in the rain Wemfula isa isa Orain come Twangale na mainsa So we can play in the rain

pages.text: Lilato sang, rubbing her fingers together.

blocks.text: Lilato sang, rubbing her fingers together.

pages.text: Ndo-ndo-ndo- ndo-ndo-ndo! More raindrops fell from the sky.

blocks.text: More raindrops fell from the sky.

pages.text: “Maya! It’s raining!” Lilato yelled. “It’s raining!” They ran outside the house.

blocks.text: “Maya! It’s raining!” Lilato yelled. “It’s raining!” They ran outside the house.

pages.text: Mama was already putting buckets around the house to collect rainwater.

blocks.text: Mama was already putting buckets around the house to collect rainwater.

pages.text: They ran to the road in front of their house and joined other children.

blocks.text: They ran to the road in front of their house and joined other children.

pages.text: A chorus of wemfula isa isa twangale na mainsa, was heard all over the neighbourhood. The sky opened and poured more rain, joining into the music of the day.

blocks.text: A chorus of wemfula isa isa twangale na mainsa, was heard all over the neighbourhood.
The sky opened and poured more rain, joining into the music of the day.
